name: sholok-blog
description: Sholok Blog Platform - Full Stack (Backend + Frontend + Admin)

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "Backend,Frontend,Admin" -c "cyan.bold,green.bold,magenta.bold" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev:only --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix admin"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "Backend,Frontend" -c "cyan.bold,green.bold" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev:only --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix admin
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix admin
